name: Bahama Fried Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat electric skillet to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cut the fish into bite-sized pieces.
3. Lightly sprinkle the fish with lemon pepper and garlic salt.
4. Combine pancake mix and bread crumbs in a paper bag.
5. Dip each piece of fish first in water, then in the egg mixture.
6. Shake the fish to coat it thoroughly with the breadcrumb mixture.
7. Fry the fish in oil for 7 minutes, or until golden brown, turning once.
8. Serve immediately.
